data.title: Harfang Advances James Bay and Ontario Portfolio With Winter Exploration Milestones
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Harfang Exploration ( (TSE:HAR) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Harfang Exploration has wrapped up a productive winter campaign across four Canadian projects, highlighted by a maiden 1,300-metre diamond drilling program at the Mista Cu-Au-Ag target on its Serpent property in Québec. Preliminary core logging indicates a sulphide-rich corridor associated with a felsic intrusive body, and assay results expected in May could clarify the discovery’s potential and guide next-phase work.

At Menarik West, a completed DC-IP survey with partner SOQUEM has defined high-confidence drill targets at both the Pierre intrusion and Cox zone, underpinning a fully funded winter 2027 drill program and reinforcing the project’s gold prospectivity. Meanwhile, a deep DC-IP survey at Blakelock is on track for April completion to finalize 2027 drill targets, and ongoing engagement with the Mishkeegogamang Ojibway Nation at Sky Lake on a Traditional Knowledge and Land Use Study underscores Harfang’s need to balance exploration momentum with Indigenous partnership and regulatory expectations.

Spark’s Take on HAR Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, HAR is a Neutral.

The score is primarily constrained by weak financial performance driven by sustained losses and meaningful cash burn, despite low leverage. Technicals are neutral-to-weak with the stock below key longer-term moving averages and a negative MACD. Offsetting these risks somewhat are constructive corporate developments (discoveries, financing, and partnerships), while valuation remains hard to frame due to negative earnings.

To see Spark’s full report on HAR stock, click here.

More about Harfang Exploration

Harfang Exploration Inc. is a mineral exploration company focused on early-stage gold and base metal projects in Eeyou Istchee James Bay, Québec, and Ontario. The company advances wholly owned properties such as Serpent, Menarik West, Blakelock, and Sky Lake, using geophysical surveys and drilling to define mineralized systems and generate drill targets in emerging Canadian mining districts.

Average Trading Volume: 116,892

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: C$4.84M

data.title: Blue Moon Feasibility Study Confirms Robust Economics for Norway Copper Project
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Blue Moon Metals ( (TSE:MOON) ) has issued an announcement.

Blue Moon Metals has completed a new feasibility study for its Nussir underground copper project in northern Norway, confirming measured and indicated resources of 28.72 million tonnes at 1.20% copper equivalent and proven and probable reserves of 24.98 million tonnes at 0.99% copper equivalent. The study outlines a 13-year mine life with planned mill throughput of 6,000 tonnes per day and life-of-mine average annual production of 19,000 tonnes of copper equivalent, including gold and silver credits.

The project generates an after-tax net present value of $235 million at an 8% discount rate using consensus metal prices and an after-tax internal rate of return of 19%, supported by average annual free cash flow of about $77 million and initial capital costs of $184 million. Blue Moon has already advanced basic engineering, committed to long-lead process plant equipment and key electrical infrastructure, and spent roughly $46.7 million on development, moving the project toward a potential production decision and hot commissioning targeted for the third quarter of 2027.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:MOON) stock is a Buy with a C$12.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Blue Moon Metals stock, see the TSE:MOON Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on MOON Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, MOON is a Neutral.

The score is primarily held down by very weak financial performance (pre-revenue, sharply widening losses, and substantial cash burn), partially offset by strong technical momentum (price well above major moving averages with positive MACD, though RSI is overextended). Valuation remains challenged due to ongoing losses and no dividend support.

To see Spark’s full report on MOON stock, click here.

More about Blue Moon Metals

Blue Moon Metals is a base metals developer focused on advancing its Nussir copper project in northern Norway. The company targets long-life, underground copper production with meaningful gold and silver by-products, positioning itself to benefit from sustained demand for critical metals in global energy transition and industrial markets.

Average Trading Volume: 224,422

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: C$690.2M

data.title: Zymeworks Sets May 7 Date to Unveil Q1 2026 Results and Pipeline Update
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Zymeworks ( (ZYME) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Zymeworks Inc., a global biotechnology company, focuses on managing licensed healthcare assets and advancing a pipeline of multifunctional biotherapeutics targeting cancer, inflammatory, and autoimmune diseases, with a business model built around asset and royalty aggregation to support cash flow and innovation. Its flagship HER2-targeted bispecific antibody Ziihera, developed using its proprietary Azymetric platform, along with other candidates such as pasritamig, is being advanced through strategic licensing deals with partners including BeOne Medicines and Jazz Pharmaceuticals.

The company announced it will report first quarter 2026 financial results after the market close on May 7, 2026, followed by a conference call and webcast the same day to review the figures and provide a corporate update. The event, accessible via the investor relations section of Zymeworks’ website, is expected to offer investors and stakeholders additional insight into the performance of its asset- and royalty-driven strategy and the progress of its clinical and commercial pipelines.

The most recent analyst rating on (ZYME) stock is a Buy with a $46.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Zymeworks stock, see the ZYME Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on ZYME Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, ZYME is a Neutral.

Overall score reflects a strong earnings-call outlook (clinical validation, regulatory path, improved FY2025 performance, and nondilutive financing) offset by weak underlying financial performance (recent losses and ongoing cash burn) and neutral technicals; valuation remains challenged due to unprofitability (negative P/E).

To see Spark’s full report on ZYME stock, click here.

More about Zymeworks

Zymeworks Inc. is a global biotechnology company that manages a portfolio of licensed healthcare assets while developing a diverse pipeline of novel, multifunctional biotherapeutics aimed at difficult-to-treat diseases, including cancer, inflammation, and autoimmune conditions. Its strategy centers on asset and royalty aggregation to optimize future cash flows from products such as HER2-targeted bispecific antibody Ziihera (zanidatamab-hrii) and other licensed candidates like pasritamig, supported by proprietary Azymetric technology and partnerships with major biopharmaceutical firms.

The company is also building a broader portfolio of healthcare assets designed to generate strong cash flows while funding the development of innovative antibody-based medicines. Leveraging expertise in antibody drug conjugates and multispecific antibody therapeutics, Zymeworks uses complementary platforms and a fully integrated drug development engine to engineer differentiated therapies and has granted regional development and commercialization rights for zanidatamab to partners including BeOne Medicines and Jazz Pharmaceuticals.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $2.06B

data.title: Kraken Robotics Secures $28 Million in New Battery and Sonar Orders
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Kraken Robotics Systems Inc ( (TSE:PNG) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Kraken Robotics Inc., a Canadian subsea technology company specializing in high-resolution sonar, imaging and power solutions for uncrewed underwater vehicles, provides systems that enhance ocean safety, infrastructure monitoring and subsea energy operations. With a global footprint spanning offices across multiple continents and customers in more than 30 countries, it focuses on defence, energy and commercial marine applications.

The company announced about $28 million in new orders for its SeaPower batteries and synthetic aperture sonar from five clients, including three large international defence firms and a new commercial uncrewed underwater vehicle manufacturer. Management highlighted that Kraken’s products are now integrated or being integrated into more than 30 UUV platform types worldwide, and the fresh contract wins come as it moves toward closing the acquisition of Covelya Group, reinforcing its growth trajectory and competitive position in underwater technologies.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:PNG) stock is a Buy with a C$13.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Kraken Robotics Systems Inc stock, see the TSE:PNG Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on PNG Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, PNG is a Neutral.

The score is primarily supported by strong revenue growth, healthy profitability, and a conservatively leveraged balance sheet, but is held back by negative operating/free cash flow and a very high P/E valuation. Technically, the trend is bullish, yet overbought momentum signals increase near-term downside risk.

To see Spark’s full report on PNG stock, click here.

More about Kraken Robotics Systems Inc

Kraken Robotics Inc. is a Canada-headquartered provider of subsea intelligence solutions, specializing in 3D imaging sensors, synthetic aperture sonar, sub-bottom imaging, LiDAR systems, and pressure-tolerant batteries. Its technologies support uncrewed underwater vehicles and subsea energy storage, serving defence, energy and infrastructure clients in more than 30 countries across North America, South America and Europe.

The company recently expanded its capabilities and market reach by agreeing to acquire Covelya Group Limited, an international supplier of mission-critical underwater technology through subsidiaries including Sonardyne International, EIVA, Forcys, Wavefront Systems, Voyis Imaging and Chelsea Technologies. This acquisition is intended to deepen Kraken’s portfolio in underwater sensing and positioning and further consolidate its role in the global subsea technology market.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

data.title: Cielo Deepens Clean Fuels Push With CDL Asset Deal and Leadership Moves
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Cielo Waste Solutions ( (TSE:CMC) ) just unveiled an update.

Cielo Waste Solutions has closed the acquisition of proprietary project development and evaluation assets from CDL Biofuels, including data, models, analytical tools, and related intellectual property for renewable and low‑carbon fuels. These assets will be integrated into Cielo’s Nexus Platform to enhance technical and economic modeling, improve project screening, and support the advancement of future clean fuels projects, including Project Nexus.

The C$2.6 million, all‑share transaction involved issuing 17,333,333 common shares to CDL Biofuels, with extended hold periods and standstill agreements covering both the consideration shares and prior financing units for up to 24 months. The deal, reviewed as a Fundamental Acquisition by the TSX Venture Exchange and still subject to final acceptance, is paired with governance and leadership changes, including the appointment of Kaush Rakhit to Cielo’s board and planned appointments of CDL executives as COO and Chief Development Officer, underscoring Cielo’s strategic realignment and completed turnaround toward a scalable clean fuels platform.

Spark’s Take on CMC Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, CMC is a Neutral.

The score is primarily pressured by very weak financial performance (minimal/zero revenue, ongoing losses and cash burn, and negative equity). Technicals add downside risk with the stock trading below key moving averages and negative MACD. Valuation provides limited offset because the company is unprofitable (negative P/E) and no dividend yield is available.

To see Spark’s full report on CMC stock, click here.

More about Cielo Waste Solutions

Cielo Waste Solutions Corp. is a Canadian clean fuels project development company listed on the TSX Venture Exchange and OTCQB. The company focuses on developing renewable and low‑carbon fuel projects, leveraging internal platforms and technical capabilities to evaluate and advance future clean fuels opportunities, including its flagship Project Nexus.

data.title: Aberdeen Group Clarifies CEO Long-Term Pay Limits Ahead of 2026 AGM
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Aberdeen Group ( (GB:ABDN) ) just unveiled an update.

Aberdeen Group plc has provided additional clarification to shareholders on its proposed 2026 Directors’ Remuneration Policy ahead of the Annual General Meeting on 29 April 2026, following engagement with key investors and proxy advisory firms. The company emphasised how long-term incentive awards for the Chief Executive Officer will be implemented under the new framework, particularly the balance between Performance Share Plan and Restricted Share Plan elements.

The Remuneration Committee confirmed that, consistent with the current policy, the CEO’s total long-term incentive opportunity will remain capped at 350% of salary, and that any combination of Restricted Share Plan and Performance Share Plan awards will not exceed 262.5% of salary, with specific sub-limits on each component. This commitment, which will apply for the three-year life of the policy, is intended to give shareholders greater transparency and reassurance on executive pay structures and their alignment with investor expectations.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:ABDN) stock is a Hold with a £210.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Aberdeen Group stock, see the GB:ABDN Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on ABDN Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, ABDN is a Outperform.

The score is driven primarily by improving financial fundamentals (profit and free-cash-flow recovery alongside low and declining leverage) and very attractive valuation (low P/E and high dividend yield). These positives are tempered by weak technical momentum and earnings-call risks around Adviser profitability, margin pressure, and near-term expected outflows despite reiterated 2026 targets.

To see Spark’s full report on ABDN stock, click here.

More about Aberdeen Group

Aberdeen Group plc is a U.K.-listed company operating in the financial services sector, with a focus on investment management and related services for institutional and individual investors. The group is governed by a board whose remuneration policies are subject to shareholder approval at its Annual General Meeting, reflecting standard practice in listed companies.

data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Kraken Robotics Systems Inc ( (TSE:PNG) ) has issued an announcement.

Kraken Robotics Inc., a Canadian-based subsea technology company, provides 3D imaging sensors, synthetic aperture sonar, sub-bottom imaging, LiDAR, and pressure-tolerant batteries for uncrewed underwater vehicles and subsea energy storage. It supports defence, energy, and marine infrastructure customers in more than 30 countries from offices across the Americas and Europe, and is pursuing further scale via the planned acquisition of underwater technology group Covelya.

Kraken announced approximately $28 million in new orders for its SeaPower batteries and synthetic aperture sonar from five clients, including three major international defence companies and a new commercial uncrewed underwater vehicle manufacturer. The deals, which extend Kraken’s integration into more than 30 UUV platform types globally, reinforce its growing position in the defence and commercial UUV markets and underscore rising demand for high-performance subsea power and imaging systems.

The company’s recent order momentum comes alongside its pending acquisition of Covelya Group Limited, a transaction expected to close in the second quarter of 2026 subject to customary conditions and approvals. Together, the new contracts and the planned acquisition signal an acceleration of Kraken’s strategy to build a broader, mission-critical underwater technology platform with deeper penetration across global subsea markets.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:PNG) stock is a Buy with a C$13.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Kraken Robotics Systems Inc stock, see the TSE:PNG Stock Forecast page.

To see Spark’s full report on PNG stock, click here.

More about Kraken Robotics Systems Inc

Kraken Robotics Inc. is a Canada-headquartered provider of subsea intelligence technologies, specializing in 3D imaging sensors, synthetic aperture sonar, sub-bottom imaging, LiDAR systems, and pressure-tolerant batteries for uncrewed underwater vehicles and subsea energy storage. The company serves defence, energy, and maritime infrastructure customers across more than 30 countries, with offices in North America, South America, and Europe.

Its solutions are designed to enhance ocean safety, infrastructure monitoring, and geological analysis by delivering high-resolution imaging and high energy density power systems for underwater operations. Kraken is also expanding its footprint in mission-critical underwater technology through the planned acquisition of Covelya Group Limited and its portfolio of specialist subsea technology subsidiaries.

data.title: Defense Metals Joins New Sprott Rare Earths Ex-China ETF
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An announcement from Defense Metals ( (TSE:DEFN) ) is now available.

Defense Metals Corp., a rare earth exploration and development company, has been added to the newly launched Sprott Rare Earths Ex-China ETF, which offers focused exposure to rare earth companies operating outside China. The ETF inclusion signals market validation of the company’s progress at its Wicheeda project in British Columbia and could broaden its investor base.

Management said the listing has the potential to attract more institutional investors and increase trading liquidity, as the fund is expected to serve as a key benchmark for investors targeting critical materials. The move underscores Defense Metals’ ambition to position Wicheeda as a significant Western source of rare earths and may strengthen its visibility within global efforts to diversify supply chains away from China.

Spark’s Take on DEFN Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, DEFN is a Neutral.

The score is held down primarily by weak financial performance (pre-revenue status, widening losses, and ongoing cash burn), partially offset by a low-debt balance sheet with substantial equity. Technicals are neutral-to-slightly positive, while valuation provides limited support given negative earnings and no dividend yield data.

To see Spark’s full report on DEFN stock, click here.

More about Defense Metals

Defense Metals Corp. is an advanced rare earth elements exploration and development company focused on supplying strategically critical metals to Western defense, high-technology and clean energy supply chains. Its primary asset is the 100%-owned Wicheeda Rare Earth Element Project near Prince George, British Columbia, considered one of the most advanced undeveloped rare earth deposits in North America or Europe and supported by a 2025 pre-feasibility study outlining its economic potential.

The company aims to advance Wicheeda through feasibility studies, permitting and ultimately into production, with the goal of becoming a reliable non-Chinese supplier of critical rare earths used in modern defence systems, advanced manufacturing and energy-efficient technologies. This focus positions Defense Metals within the strategic push by Western economies to secure independent supplies of key materials underpinning the energy transition and national security.

Average Trading Volume: 399,181

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: C$82.48M
